source: fair-gen004 weights plus end-in-beam challenger defect fix and beginner follow-up calibration
notes: Adopts candidate (a) for fair-cpu followup 2c: challenger beam planning always keeps end available, preventing repeated low-value relic replacement when passing is the better terminal state. The initial beginner underflow after the challenger fix was treated as a real challenger strength signal per the 2026-07-09 user decision, then beginner was recalibrated back into the 5-20% band. Weights remain identical to fair-gen004; fair-gen005 is frozen as the engine/profile generation after this CPU behavior change.
